data.title: GSR withdrew 3,000 ETH from Binance 3 hours ago, worth $6.23 million.
data.description: According to The Data Nerd, GSR withdrew 3,000 ETH (approximately $6.23 million) from Binance within 3 hours.

data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Milan: It is appropriate to continue cutting interest rates at the March meeting; the outlook remains unchanged despite the outbreak of the conflict with Iran.
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Milan stated that it would be appropriate to continue cutting interest rates at the March meeting; the outlook remains unchanged despite the outbreak of the conflict in Iran, and he hopes to continue cutting rates by 0.25 percentage points each time until the Fed's interest rates reach a neutral level, at which point a reassessment will be conducted. (Jinshi)

data.title: Sri Lankan Deputy Foreign Minister Comments on Ship's Route
data.description: Sri Lankan Deputy Foreign Minister stated that the ship was returning to Iran from an eastern Indian port. According to Jin10, this information was disclosed during a recent briefing. The ship's journey has attracted attention due to its geopolitical implications, as it navigates through a region with complex international relations. The vessel's route highlights ongoing maritime activities between India and Iran, reflecting broader regional dynamics. Further details about the ship's cargo or specific purpose were not provided in the statement.

data.title: Poll Shows Growing Russian Support for Peace Talks Amid Ukraine Conflict
data.description: A recent opinion poll indicates that a record number of Russians are in favor of peace negotiations over the continuation of the Kremlin's military actions in Ukraine. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that despite the increasing preference for diplomatic solutions, support for the military operation remains substantial among the Russian populace. The survey reflects a shift in public sentiment as the conflict persists, with many citizens advocating for a resolution through dialogue rather than prolonged warfare. This development comes amid ongoing international discussions and efforts to address the situation in Ukraine.

data.title: Inter Miami Secures Stadium Naming Rights Deal with Nubank
data.description: Inter Miami, the soccer team featuring superstar Lionel Messi, has entered into an agreement with Nubank, granting the financial technology giant the naming rights for the team's new stadium. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significance of this partnership for both parties involved. The deal marks a strategic move for Nubank as it continues to expand its brand presence in the sports industry. Meanwhile, Inter Miami benefits from the financial support and increased visibility that comes with such a high-profile collaboration. This development is part of a broader trend of financial institutions seeking to align themselves with popular sports teams to enhance their market reach.

data.title: Fed Governor Milan: No Communication with President Trump Since Resigning from White House Economic Advisory Role
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Milan has stated that he has not communicated with U.S. President Donald Trump since stepping down from his position as Chairman of the White House Economic Advisory Council. According to Jin10, Milan's resignation marked a significant shift in his professional engagements, distancing himself from direct involvement with the current administration. This development comes amidst ongoing discussions about the Federal Reserve's policies and their impact on the U.S. economy. Milan's statement highlights the separation between his current role at the Federal Reserve and his previous advisory position at the White House.

data.title: Iranian Veterans Request to Join Forces Amid U.S.-Israel Tensions
data.description: Iran's military announced today, March 4, that a significant number of retired veterans and veterans of the Iran-Iraq war have applied to join active-duty soldiers in response to attacks from the U.S. and Israel. According to Jin10, this request has been approved by Commander-in-Chief Hatami. The announcement highlights the ongoing tensions in the region and the readiness of Iranian forces to respond to perceived threats.

data.title: Fed Governor Milan: Too Early to Assess Impact of Iran Policy
data.description: U.S. Federal Reserve Governor Milan stated that it is premature to form a definitive view on the impact of current U.S. policy towards Iran. According to Jin10, Milan emphasized the complexity of geopolitical factors and their potential influence on economic conditions. The governor highlighted the need for careful monitoring of developments in the region, as they could have significant implications for global markets and economic stability. Milan's comments come amid ongoing tensions and uncertainty surrounding U.S.-Iran relations, which have been a focal point for investors and policymakers alike. The Federal Reserve continues to assess the situation closely, considering its potential effects on monetary policy and economic outlook.

data.title: Container Ship Struck by Unknown Projectile in Strait of Hormuz
data.description: A container ship was hit by an unidentified projectile while navigating the Strait of Hormuz, according to the UK Navy. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the ongoing threats to commercial shipping in the area amid regional conflicts. The incident underscores the persistent risks faced by vessels in this strategically important waterway, which is a vital passage for global trade.

data.title: Tokenized Securities Demand Interoperability for Market Efficiency
data.description: The Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation (DTCC), Euroclear, and Clearstream have highlighted the necessity for seamless interoperability between blockchain and traditional financial systems for tokenized securities. According to NS3.AI, these organizations stress that ensuring 'same asset, same rights, same outcome' is crucial to avoid increased costs and fragmented liquidity pools. They advocate for unified standards to safeguard investor rights and enhance market efficiency.

data.title: Stablecoin infrastructure Cyclops raises $8 million, with participation from Castle Island Venture and others.
data.description: Stablecoin infrastructure provider Cyclops announced the completion of an $8 million funding round, with participation from Castle Island Ventures, F-Prime, and Shift4 Payments. Specific valuation details were not disclosed. (Fortune)

data.title: U.S. Military Leader Comments on Iran's Command and Control System
data.description: U.S. military leader General Kane has expressed concerns over the state of Iran's command and control system. According to Jin10, General Kane highlighted that the system is not in optimal condition, which could have implications for regional stability. The assessment comes amid ongoing tensions in the Middle East, where geopolitical dynamics continue to evolve. The general's remarks underscore the importance of monitoring developments in Iran's military capabilities and infrastructure. This evaluation may influence future diplomatic and military strategies in the region.

data.title: Middle Eastern Nations Strengthen Defense Measures
data.description: U.S. military leader General Mark Milley has highlighted the efforts of Middle Eastern countries to enhance their defense capabilities. According to Jin10, nations such as Jordan, Bahrain, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, and the United Arab Emirates are taking proactive steps to safeguard their populations. These countries are focusing on bolstering their defense systems amid regional tensions and security challenges. The move underscores a growing emphasis on self-reliance in defense strategies among these nations.

data.title: NATO's Response to Iranian Missile Incident: No Invocation of Article 5
data.description: U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth stated that NATO's decision to shoot down an Iranian missile will not lead to the invocation of Article 5. According to Jin10, Article 5 of the NATO treaty stipulates that an armed attack against one member is considered an attack against all members, potentially leading to collective defense measures. However, Hegseth clarified that the recent incident involving the Iranian missile does not meet the criteria for such a response. The situation remains tense, but NATO is opting for diplomatic channels to address the issue rather than escalating military involvement. The decision reflects a cautious approach to avoid further conflict in the region.

data.title: Israeli Military Conducts Airstrikes in Southern Lebanon
data.description: The Israeli military has launched several airstrikes in southern Lebanon. According to NS3.AI, the information was shared by Walter Bloomberg on the social platform X. Currently, there is limited information available regarding the scope and specific targets of these strikes.

data.title: U.S. Central Command Establishes Air Superiority in Southern Iran
data.description: U.S. Central Command has reportedly established localized air superiority in the southern coastal region of Iran. According to Jin10, this development was confirmed by a senior U.S. military official, General Kane. The move comes amid heightened tensions in the region, with strategic implications for both U.S. and Iranian military operations. The establishment of air superiority is seen as a significant tactical advantage, potentially influencing future engagements and diplomatic negotiations. This development underscores the ongoing complexities in U.S.-Iran relations and the broader geopolitical landscape in the Middle East.

data.title: U.S. Central Command Shifts Focus to Close-Range Precision Strikes
data.description: U.S. Central Command is undergoing a strategic transformation, according to General Kane, the highest-ranking officer in the United States. According to Jin10, the command is moving away from large-scale long-range precision strikes to emphasize close-range precision engagements. This shift reflects a broader adaptation to evolving military needs and operational environments. The change aims to enhance the effectiveness and responsiveness of U.S. military operations in various regions. General Kane's announcement highlights the ongoing efforts to recalibrate military strategies to address contemporary challenges and threats. The transition underscores the importance of agility and precision in modern warfare, ensuring that the U.S. military remains capable of addressing diverse security concerns efficiently.

data.title: BlackRock withdrew 3,809 BTC and deposited 19,637 ETH from Coinbase in the past 24 hours.
data.description: According to The Data Nerd, BlackRock withdrew 3,809 BTC ($259.79 million) from Coinbase and deposited 19,637 ETH ($39.74 million) in the past 24 hours.

data.title: The ADP nonfarm payrolls report slightly exceeded expectations, and the market continues to anticipate the Federal Reserve keeping rates unchanged in March.
data.description: The ADP National Employment Report released Wednesday showed that U.S. private sector employment rose more than expected in February, but the previous month's figure was significantly revised downward. Private sector employment increased by 63,000 last month, while January's figure was revised down to 11,000 from the previously reported increase of 22,000. The data may indicate that although the labor market was shaken last year due to uncertainty caused by import tariffs, it has now stabilized. The stable labor market and still high inflation are seen as factors encouraging the Federal Reserve to keep interest rates unchanged this month. In addition, the U.S.-Israeli air battle against Iran and retaliatory actions by Tehran have pushed up oil and gas prices, prompting traders to lower their expectations for rate cuts this year due to concerns that the conflict will fuel inflation. Currently, the likelihood of a rate cut in June has been greatly reduced. The U.S. Federal Reserve kept its benchmark overnight rate in the 3.50%-3.75% range in January. (Jinshi Data APP)

data.title: A whale swapped 102 BTC for 3489 ETH.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale exchanged 102 BTC (US$7.23 million) for 3489 ETH through ThorChain.
